title: stillingia dentata
intro: Stillingia dentata, also known as Queen's Delight, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Stillingia dentata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Stillingia dentata are typically made into tinctures, teas, or salves, and are commonly used to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
